title: alamya-health/ont-fshd-wf
description: Tower-friendly modular Nextflow workflow for D4Z4 / DUX4 facioscapulohumeral dystrophy profiling from either aligned BAM input or a folder of unaligned BAMs.

sample_id.description: Single-sample identifier when not using a samplesheet.

reuse_input_t2t_alignment.description: Reuse the provided aligned BAM directly if it is already T2T-aligned and indexed.

input_aligned_bai.description: BAM index for aligned BAM input.

input_ubam_dir.description: Directory containing one or more unaligned BAM files.

t2t_ref_fasta.description: T2T-CHM13v2.0 FASTA used for alignment and methylation.

t2t_ref_mmi.description: Optional T2T minimap2 MMI index for faster alignment startup. Leave blank to align directly against the FASTA.

blast_db_dir.description: Directory containing the DUCKS4 BLAST database files.

fshd_locus_bed.description: BED file for locus extraction on T2T coordinates.

methylation_regions_bed.description: BED file for methylation summarization on T2T coordinates.

run_methylation.description: Attempt modkit-based methylation profiling after repairing MM/ML tags onto the T2T-aligned subset BAMs.

run_variant_calling.description: Enable HG38-based Clair3, Whatshap, Sniffles2, and ClinVar/snpEff annotation for FSHD-relevant variant calling.

contraction_threshold_ru.description: Threshold used in the HTML report to flag a complete 4qA read as contracted.

minimap2_preset.description: Minimap2 preset used when aligning BAM/uBAM reads to T2T or HG38.

hg38_ref_fasta.description: HG38 no-alt reference FASTA for variant calling.

hg38_ref_mmi.description: Optional HG38 minimap2 MMI index for faster alignment startup in the variant branch. Leave blank to align directly against the FASTA.

clair3_model_tgz.description: Tarball containing the Clair3 ONT model directory.

clinvar_vcf_tbi.description: Tabix index for the ClinVar VCF.gz.

snpeff_data_tgz.description: Tarball containing snpEff data with a hg38 database under data/hg38.

output_dir.description: Base output directory or object store prefix for published files.
